articles.title: How Boston.com readers feel about the Boston Marathon not making this list of best marathons
articles.description:
"Hard to justify keeping one of the world's most renowned marathons off the list."

The post How Boston.com readers feel about the Boston Marathon not making this list of best marathons appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Boston Marathon excluded from USA Today's best marathons list, sparking local reader outrage.
Readers express disbelief over the omission of the iconic marathon, held annually since 1897.
Local businesses and tourism may suffer due to diminished recognition of Boston's premier event.

articles.title: Increase in bear encounters prompts new requirements for White Mountains visitors
articles.description:
The Pemigewasset Wilderness will require overnight visitors to carry bear canisters starting May 1.

The post Increase in bear encounters prompts new requirements for White Mountains visitors appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: White Mountains will require bear canisters for overnight visitors starting May 1.
Increase in bear encounters has prompted this new regulation for safety.
Boston residents planning trips must comply to ensure wildlife safety.

articles.title: Southbridge woman tried to hit teen with car while driving with daughter, police say
articles.description:
Police say the woman stated she was attempting “to retaliate” after the teen was in an altercation with her daughter.

The post Southbridge woman tried to hit teen with car while driving with daughter, police say appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Southbridge woman attempted to hit a 16-year-old with her car during a dispute.
The incident occurred while she was driving with her daughter on April 9, 2026.
Local authorities emphasize the dangers of retaliatory actions in community conflicts.

articles.title: Industrial explosion sends 13 people to the hospital in East Providence
articles.description:
It remains unclear what caused the explosion at the Aspen Aerogels-run industrial plant.

summary: An industrial explosion occurred at Aspen Aerogels in East Providence, sending 13 people to the hospital.

Local residents may face increased safety concerns and potential disruptions in nearby industrial operations.

His historic debut inspires local youth athletes in Boston pursuing baseball careers.

articles.title: What you can get in Boston and its suburbs for under $1 million that’s bigger than ‘a postage stamp’

articles.title: Protesters in downtown Boston demand ‘complete end’ to ‘illegal wars’ with Iran, Lebanon
articles.description:
“I’m seeing it happen again where new military families are seeing their loved ones sent off to an illegal, immoral, and unjustifiable war,” Military Families Speak Out co-founder Nancy Lessin said.

The post Protesters in downtown Boston demand ‘complete end’ to ‘illegal wars’ with Iran, Lebanon appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Protesters gathered in downtown Boston on April 9 to oppose military actions in Iran and Lebanon.
Military Families Speak Out co-founder Nancy Lessin highlighted concerns for new military families affected.
The protest reflects growing local discontent over U.S. military involvement abroad, impacting Boston communities.
